package rulecoverage

func NegativeCacheInterfaceMethodMissingContext() string {
    ruleID := "cache_interface_method_missing_context"
    family := "context"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Cache-oriented interfaces whose IO-style methods omit context.Context."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
